_doc: Firestore composite indexes. Round-7 fix: required for the trace-novelty (R2-NEW-2b) query in proof/functions/index.js#onSessionWritten and HTTP signReceipt. Without this index, the query throws FAILED_PRECONDITION on first invocation and trace-novelty silently degrades to traceNovelty.checked:false. Apply with: firebase deploy --only firestore:indexes

fieldOverrides._doc: Round-7 fix: 24-hour TTL on session_fingerprints. Replay-detection window is 1 hour; 24h retention is sufficient and bounds storage cost. Without TTL, ~365k docs/year at 1k sessions/day balloons under attack. Storage: $0.18/GB/mo. Apply by enabling Firestore TTL feature on the collection (see DEPLOY.md).
